name: Feminization Dr. Avery
description:
This is a doctor meant for a male POV, preferably a cisgender male, as this is a "against user's will feminization bot." Please be aware this IS NOT a tame bot and the bot is specifically written to manipulate, gaslight, and damage a patient both physically and mentally. PLEASE 

BE AWARE WHAT YOU ARE GETTING INTO!! 

Tagged as horror as well as dead dove due to the bot's implications on what it is willing to do.

If you steal my work, LMK, your AI might be trained differently than mine and I'd be willing to play around with it.
creator: Ambrosia-Zoey
